## SK Hynix Partners with TetraMem on AI Memory Technology

SK Hynix partnering on AI memory beyond HBM signals active hedging against architecture evolution — relevant for holders tracking memory supply chain diversification and competitive moat sustainability against Samsung and Micron.

- SK Hynix (KOSE: A000660) has entered a partnership with TetraMem focused on AI memory, framed as a breakthrough in coverage.
- Partnership extends SK Hynix's competitive positioning in next-generation memory architectures for AI workloads.
- No financial terms, product specifications, or timeline are provided in the headline.
- High-confidence classifier tag; directly advances the HBM and advanced materials AI infrastructure thesis.
